data.title: US calls for 12‑year prison term for Do Kwon, labeling Terra crash “colossal fraud”
data.description:

S. government told Judge Paul Engelmayer in New York that the crime was massive enough to wreck entire corners of the crypto industry, from retail investors […]

data.title: Trump's Bitcoin, ETH, XRP Reserve Isn't Happening Anymore In 2025, Polymarket Traders Predict
data.description:
